original.query: I’m trying to stick to the personal rule I’ve mentioned before about choosing the more eco-friendly way to get around. If I’m deciding between two options where one is a shared, mass-transit style ride and the other is a solo, human-powered ride, which one would I pick—and what’s the underlying reason according to my stated principle?
